subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! Great is the blessedness awaiting thee, inasmuch as thou hast adorned thine heart with the ornament of the love of thy Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد قبل علی طوبی لک بما زینت قلبک بطراز حب ربک العزیز الحمید هر نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of the Manifestation of God
